body: Rebecca, we still need the guest bio and topic paragraph for January 17 by end of day Thursday. Studio engineers need it for the intro roll.
I have the bio - sending it over tonight after I finish the script draft. She confirmed her topic: grief and resilience in community. Perfect for this season.
Great. Also reminder - Covenant's read spot goes in the 7:30 break. Mitchell's is the 8:15 close.
Hi Rebecca, attached is our January invoice. Could you confirm the January read count so we can finalize billing?
Confirmed - 8 live reads in December (4 Saturdays x 2 breaks). I'll countersign and return the invoice by Friday.
APC recertification hours Q3.
Rebecca, Golden Heart's chaplaincy team wants to co-host the interfaith prayer breakfast in November. Are you open to a joint feature on Morning Reflections before the event?
Angela, I love this idea. Let's get it on the October 24 show - enough runway to promote. Can you send me a one-paragraph description and your headshot by October 1?
Rebecca, here's the Valentine's Day ad copy draft. Please review and let us know if the closing line works for the 30-second spot.
The copy reads well. I'd soften 'treat her' to 'honor her' - fits the show tone better. Otherwise approved.
Bedside sitting Tue 2 PM — hospice family.
Sister Rebecca, the health fair committee set the date for October 3. We'd love a promotional mention on the December 19 broadcast and again on December 26.
Deacon Mosley, I've got both dates blocked. I'll write a 60-second community PSA and run it both Saturdays. TJ will log it as a community service announcement.
Dorothy Sunday lunch after church.
Rebecca, I've read the New Year meditation draft. The opening paragraph is powerful. I'd add a verse reference after the third paragraph - Psalm 30:5 would land beautifully there.
Pastor Greer, thank you. That verse is exactly right. Added it and tightened the close. Final draft attached. See you at sunrise.
Pastor Greer coffee Thursday 3 PM — sermon prep.
Hi Rebecca, our current sponsorship wraps at the end of the year. We'd like to renew for the full 2026 season. Same 30-second spot format - can you confirm availability and rate?
Great to hear from you. 2026 spots are available. I'll loop in TJ on the rate card and get you a renewal agreement by January 30. Glad to have Bluff City Auto Care back.
Rebecca, per our records you are at 28 of 50 CPE continuing education hours for 2026. You need 22 more by December 31. Have you registered for the February APC webinar series?
Yes - I registered for the February APC webinar (6 hrs) and the March clinical ethics intensive (8 hrs). That puts me at 42. I'll find the remaining 8 in a fall workshop.
Garden Saturday morning — tomato plants.
Mom, I'm in! Sports broadcasting segment sounds fun. Should I come to the Beale Street studio or can we pre-record?
Come to the studio - the in-person energy is better for this kind of conversation. Plan for the January 10 show, second hour, around 8:10. Arrive by 6:45.
Garden Saturday morning — tomato plants.
Rebecca - Cafe Eclectic at 10 still works for me Saturday. See you after the broadcast!
Perfect. I have a full show this week - grief resilience guest plus the health fair PSA. I will need that veggie omelet and good company afterward.
Becca, I'm planning to drive up from Jackson for Thanksgiving. Are you thinking the full spread again? I'll bring the peach cobbler.
Yes - full spread. Fried chicken, pot roast, cornbread, mac and cheese. Naomi is handling sweet potatoes. Your peach cobbler is non-negotiable. Marcus will be home from campus.
APC recertification hours Q3.
Mom, are we still doing Sunday dinner at your place on January 18? I can bring a salad.
Yes, come after church - doors open at noon. Bring the salad. I am making pot roast and cornbread.
Mercy vet Wednesday — checkup only.
Rebecca, the APC regional conference needs panel topic submissions by February 15. I am proposing 'Burnout and Boundaries in Acute Care Chaplaincy.' Would you co-present?
Angela, that topic is timely and I would be honored. I can speak to the oncology and ICU side. Let's draft the abstract together - can you share a working doc by February 12?
APC recertification hours Q3.
Sister Rebecca, wanted to touch base early on the October 31 fall festival. The committee is planning the trunk-or-treat from 5 to 8 PM. Will you be available to emcee again this year?
Deacon Mosley, I already have October 31 marked. Count me in. I'll start pulling together a theme and some community spotlight segments for the evening program.
Rebecca, the 7th anniversary episode is shaping up well. I'm thinking a listener call-in segment plus a retrospective audio montage from 2019 through now. Are you good with a two-hour special?
Two hours works. The call-in idea is strong - listeners have been part of this journey from the start. Let's book it for early October. I want Pastor Greer and Sandra on as guests.
APC recertification hours Q3.
